results.prompt: What is the average number of modules per subscription and average subscription value, broken down by engagement tier (standard, silver, gold)? Which tier has the deepest average analytics portfolio?
results.output:
Based on the query results:

| tier | avg_modules_per_subscription | avg_subscription_value |
|------|------------------------------|------------------------|
| gold | 2.1538461538461537 | 40623.07692307692 |
| silver | 2.5166666666666666 | 48591.666666666664 |
| standard | 2.5634920634920637 | 49160.71428571428 |

**Which tier has the deepest average analytics portfolio?**

The **standard** tier has the deepest average analytics portfolio with an average of 2.56 modules per subscription, compared to silver (2.52) and gold (2.15).
